_comment: Single source of truth for the omni vision wall (hitthe.link/vision). Add a device = one entry, no code change. 'room' is the security gate: unguessable 128-bit vdo.ninja room id, must match the device's publisher. Set enabled:false to hide a tile without deleting its room. Publisher autostart points kiosk Chrome at /vision/pub.html?dev=<dev>.
